OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 3
Judge: Julie Tang, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Richard Lim is present.
Attorney Andrew Catterall for the plaintiff.
Defendants Charlie Elbaz, Ussama Freij, Phil McGarr are present.
Defendant Moshe Benattar is NOT present. Defendant is on phone standby in Israel.
Attorney Roni Rotholz appearing for defendants Moshe Benattar and Charlie Elbaz in full scope.
Attorney Salavatore Timpano appearing for defendants Ussama Freij and Phil McGarr in full scope.

The Judge , litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. Defendant Moshe Benatta was not present. The trial date of Mar. 28, 2016 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
